mapper.select: SELECT ep.eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, COALESCE(qe.status, 'NO_INPUT') AS qualStatus, CASE WHEN self_score.total_points IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE 1 + ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT peer_score.total_points) FROM employee peer JOIN ( SELECT s1.employee_id, s1.total_points FROM score s1 JOIN ( SELECT employee_id, MAX(eval_period_id) AS max_eval_period_id FROM score GROUP BY employee_id ) latest_peer ON latest_peer.employee_id = s1.employee_id AND latest_peer.max_eval_period_id = s1.eval_period_id ) peer_score ON peer_score.employee_id = peer.employee_id WHERE peer.employee_role = 'WORKER' AND peer.employee_status = 'ACTIVE' AND peer.department_id = self_emp.department_id AND peer_score.total_points > self_score.total_points ) END AS rank, CASE WHEN self_score.total_points IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee peer JOIN ( SELECT s1.employee_id, s1.total_points FROM score s1 JOIN ( SELECT employee_id, MAX(eval_period_id) AS max_eval_period_id FROM score GROUP BY employee_id ) latest_peer ON latest_peer.employee_id = s1.employee_id AND latest_peer.max_eval_period_id = s1.eval_period_id ) peer_score ON peer_score.employee_id = peer.employee_id WHERE peer.employee_role = 'WORKER' AND peer.employee_status = 'ACTIVE' AND peer.department_id = self_emp.department_id ) END AS rankTotal FROM evaluation_period ep JOIN employee self_emp ON self_emp.employee_id = #{employeeId} LEFT JOIN ( SELECT s1.employee_id, s1.total_points FROM score s1 JOIN ( SELECT employee_id, MAX(eval_period_id) AS max_eval_period_id FROM score GROUP BY employee_id ) latest_self ON latest_self.employee_id = s1.employee_id AND latest_self.max_eval_period_id = s1.eval_period_id ) self_score ON self_score.employee_id = self_emp.employee_id LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe ON qe.evaluation_period_id = ep.eval_period_id AND qe.evaluatee_id = #{employeeId} AND qe.evaluation_level = 3 WHERE ep.status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'CONFIRMED') ORDER BY CASE WHEN ep.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 0 WHEN ep.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, ep.eval_year DESC, ep.eval_sequence DESC, ep.eval_period_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT qe.qualitative_evaluation_id AS qualitativeEvaluationId, qe.evaluation_level AS evaluationLevel, qe.grade, qe.score, qe.eval_items AS evalItems, qe.eval_comment AS evalComment, qe.status, ep.eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = qe.evaluation_period_id WHERE qe.evaluatee_id = #{employeeId} AND qe.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND qe.evaluation_level IN (1, 2) AND qe.status = 'SUBMITTED' ORDER BY qe.evaluation_level ASC

SELECT qn.quantitative_evaluation_id AS quantitativeEvaluationId, ep.eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, qn.uph_score AS uphScore, qn.yield_score AS yieldScore, qn.lead_time_score AS leadTimeScore, qn.actual_error AS actualError, qn.s_quant AS sQuant, qn.t_score AS tScore, qn.material_shielding AS materialShielding, qn.status FROM quantitative_evaluation qn JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = qn.eval_period_id WHERE qn.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND qn.eval_period_id = #{periodId} AND qn.quantitative_evaluation_id = ( SELECT qx.quantitative_evaluation_id FROM quantitative_evaluation qx WHERE qx.employee_id = qn.employee_id AND qx.eval_period_id = qn.eval_period_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN qx.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 0 WHEN qx.status = 'TEMPORARY' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, COALESCE(qx.updated_at, qx.created_at) DESC, qx.quantitative_evaluation_id DESC LIMIT 1 )

SELECT qe.qualitative_evaluation_id AS qualitativeEvaluationId, ep.eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, qe.grade, qe.score, qe.eval_items AS evalItems, ( SELECT ev1.employee_name FROM qualitative_evaluation q1 JOIN employee ev1 ON ev1.employee_id = q1.evaluator_id WHERE q1.evaluatee_id = qe.evaluatee_id AND q1.evaluation_period_id = qe.evaluation_period_id AND q1.evaluation_level = 1 ORDER BY CASE WHEN q1.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 0 WHEN q1.status = 'SUBMITTED' THEN 1 WHEN q1.status = 'DRAFT' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, COALESCE(q1.confirmed_at, q1.updated_at, q1.created_at) DESC, q1.qualitative_evaluation_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS firstEvaluatorName, ( SELECT ev2.employee_name FROM qualitative_evaluation q2 JOIN employee ev2 ON ev2.employee_id = q2.evaluator_id WHERE q2.evaluatee_id = qe.evaluatee_id AND q2.evaluation_period_id = qe.evaluation_period_id AND q2.evaluation_level = 2 ORDER BY CASE WHEN q2.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 0 WHEN q2.status = 'SUBMITTED' THEN 1 WHEN q2.status = 'DRAFT' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, COALESCE(q2.confirmed_at, q2.updated_at, q2.created_at) DESC, q2.qualitative_evaluation_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS secondEvaluatorName, qe.status FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = qe.evaluation_period_id WHERE qe.evaluatee_id = #{employeeId} AND qe.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND qe.qualitative_evaluation_id = ( SELECT qx.qualitative_evaluation_id FROM qualitative_evaluation qx WHERE qx.evaluatee_id = qe.evaluatee_id AND qx.evaluation_period_id = qe.evaluation_period_id AND qx.evaluation_level IN (1, 2) ORDER BY CASE WHEN qx.evaluation_level = 2 AND qx.eval_items IS NOT NULL AND qx.eval_items != '' AND qx.eval_items != '{}' THEN 0 WHEN qx.evaluation_level = 1 AND qx.eval_items IS NOT NULL AND qx.eval_items != '' AND qx.eval_items != '{}' THEN 1 WHEN qx.evaluation_level = 2 THEN 2 WHEN qx.evaluation_level = 1 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, CASE WHEN qx.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 0 WHEN qx.status = 'SUBMITTED' THEN 1 WHEN qx.status = 'DRAFT' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, COALESCE(qx.confirmed_at, qx.updated_at, qx.created_at) DESC, qx.qualitative_evaluation_id DESC LIMIT 1 )

SELECT COALESCE(qe3.qualitative_evaluation_id, qe2.qualitative_evaluation_id) AS qualitativeEvaluationId, ep.eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, COALESCE(qe3.grade, qe2.grade) AS grade, COALESCE(qe3.score, qe2.score) AS score, COALESCE(qe3.status, qe2.status) AS status, qe3.confirmed_at AS confirmedAt, qe1.score AS firstScore, qe2.score AS secondScore, qn.t_score AS quantScore, CASE WHEN ea.appeal_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS underReview, CASE WHEN ea.appeal_id IS NOT NULL THEN FALSE WHEN qe3.confirmed_at IS NOT NULL AND qe3.confirmed_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 7 DAY THEN TRUE WHEN qe2.status = 'SUBMITTED' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS appealable FROM qualitative_evaluation qe2 JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = qe2.evaluation_period_id LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe1 ON qe1.evaluatee_id = qe2.evaluatee_id AND qe1.evaluation_period_id = qe2.evaluation_period_id AND qe1.evaluation_level = 1 LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe3 ON qe3.evaluatee_id = qe2.evaluatee_id AND qe3.evaluation_period_id = qe2.evaluation_period_id AND qe3.evaluation_level = 3 LEFT JOIN quantitative_evaluation qn ON qn.employee_id = qe2.evaluatee_id AND qn.eval_period_id = qe2.evaluation_period_id LEFT JOIN evaluation_appeal ea ON ea.appeal_employee_id = qe2.evaluatee_id AND ea.evaluation_period_id = qe2.evaluation_period_id WHERE qe2.evaluatee_id = #{employeeId} AND qe2.evaluation_level = 2 AND qe2.status = 'SUBMITTED' ORDER BY ep.eval_year DESC, ep.eval_sequence DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qualitative_evaluation qe WHERE qe.evaluatee_id = #{employeeId} AND qe.evaluation_level = 2 AND qe.status = 'SUBMITTED'

SELECT eval_period_id FROM evaluation_period WHERE status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'CONFIRMED') ORDER BY CASE WHEN status = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 0 WHEN status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, eval_year DESC, eval_sequence DESC, eval_period_id DESC LIMIT 1
